# supermodel-api-docs Architecture Docs

## Entitys
- [DocumentationCore Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/domain-documentationcore.html): The central engine responsible for managing MDX content, project structure, and technical documentation layouts. Architectural overview of the DocumentationCore domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [OpenAPISpec Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/domain-openapispec.html): Handles the ingestion and structural validation of the OpenAPI 3.x specification used to generate API references. Architectural overview of the OpenAPISpec domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [ThemingEngine Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/domain-themingengine.html): Manages the visual presentation and brand identity across the documentation portal. Architectural overview of the ThemingEngine domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [docs.json — supermodel-api-docs Source File](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/file-docs-json.html): Architecture documentation for docs.json, a json file in the supermodel-api-docs codebase.
- [overrides.css — supermodel-api-docs Source File](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/file-overrides-css.html): Architecture documentation for overrides.css, a css file in the supermodel-api-docs codebase.
